notes: All 16 tactic ids and names were read verbatim from the top-level `tactics:` mapping of the pinned raw YAML (HTTP 200, 625,790 bytes); the file self-identifies as format-version 6.0.0, version '2026.06', modified-date 2026-05-27. Coarse level returned is the 16 tactics (the grouping); the finer element_type these tactics organize is attack-technique, per the task. Caveat on source path: the repo's default `dist/ATLAS.yaml` is DEPRECATED and frozen at version 5.6.0 (schema format-version differs and TA0000/TA0001 are still labeled "ML Model Access"/"ML Attack Staging" there) — do NOT use it. The v2026.06 file used here renames TA0000 to "AI Model Access" and TA0001 to "AI Attack Staging". Note the non-sequential naming order in the source: AML.TA0000 (AI Model Access) and AML.TA0001 (AI Attack Staging) precede the operational-lifecycle tactics that begin at AML.TA0002 (Reconnaissance); this is the source's own ordering, not a fetch artifact. No elements flagged; nothing fabricated.
